ns0:entry.ns0:title: App-vNext/Polly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/App-vNext/Polly
Language: c%23
Polly is a .NET resilience and transient-fault-handling library that allows developers to express policies such as Retry, Circuit Breaker, Timeout, Bulkhead Isolation, and Fallback in a fluent and thread-safe manner. From version 6.0.1, Polly targets .NET Standard 1.1 and 2.0+.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JosefNemec/Playnite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JosefNemec/Playnite
Language: c%23
Video game library manager with support for wide range of 3rd party libraries and game emulation support, providing one unified interface for your games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles. Do more with Blazor, utilizing CSS and keeping JavaScript to a bare minimum.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RMC-14/RMC-14
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RMC-14/RMC-14
Language: c%23
RMC-14 is an asymmetric PvP game that runs on Robust Toolbox.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StockSharp/StockSharp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StockSharp/StockSharp
Language: c%23
Algorithmic trading and quantitative trading open source platform to develop trading robots (stock markets, forex, crypto, bitcoins, and options).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: btcpayserver/btcpayserver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/btcpayserver/btcpayserver
Language: c%23
Accept Bitcoin payments. Free, open-source & self-hosted, Bitcoin payment processor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duplicati/duplicati
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duplicati/duplicati
Language: c%23
Store securely encrypted backups in the cloud!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: files-community/Files
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/files-community/Files
Language: c%23
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template for ASP.NET Core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-dotnet-contrib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-dotnet-contrib
Language: c%23
This repository contains set of components extending functionality of the OpenTelemetry .NET SDK. Instrumentation libraries, exporters, and other components can find their home here.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unoplatform/uno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unoplatform/uno
Language: c%23
Open-source platform for building cross-platform native Mobile, Web, Desktop and Embedded apps quickly. Create rich, C#/XAML, single-codebase apps from any IDE. Hot Reload included! 90m+ NuGet Downloads!!
